---
title: "Sociology"
author: "Kevin Gilds"
description: "The Sociological Imagination"
date: "2026-05-10"
categories: [Blog Roll]
---

JA Westenberg writes a weekly column on technology, culture, and philosophy.

<https://www.joanwestenberg.com/about/>

My two cents- the posts display the sociological imagination. The posts connect the "interplay of man and society and the history of self and world" (p. 4).

<https://ratical.org/ratville/AoS/TheSociologicalImagination.pdf>
